_comment: Decision Log. Major owner decisions, newest first. date is free text ('2026-06-19' or 'reported').

items.decision: No new feature/game/GrowVerse/Frontier/tool work starts until Mission Control v1 exists
items.why: Build velocity is outpacing project tracking; the owner needs one place to see every repo, PR, agent, status, blocker, and owner action first.
items.followUp: Ship Mission Control v1, then the owner re-opens lanes deliberately.

items.why: Keeps the gated control plane + marketing site in one zero-build static repo.
items.followUp: Mission Control lives at /lab/mission-control inside Devbiz.

items.decision: Aether Wing gameplay should NOT be built in Devbiz
items.why: Devbiz is zero-build static; the game needs a real Vite/TypeScript/Three.js toolchain.
items.followUp: Build it in the correct frontier-al scaffold after folder/repo confirmation.

items.decision: Aether Wing is built in the frontier-al Vite/TypeScript/Three.js scaffold after folder/repo confirmation
items.why: Right tool for a 3D game; keeps Devbiz clean.
items.followUp: Owner confirms the frontier-al folder/repo; then Phase 1 kickoff.

items.decision: No wallet / blockchain / account systems in Phase 1 Aether Wing
items.why: Keep Phase 1 focused on a playable slice; defer economy/identity.
items.followUp: Revisit only after a playable Phase 1 is verified.

items.decision: Cloudflare Access protects /lab externally; local dev remains open
items.why: Edge gate before assets are served — no secrets in the repo, no login form to maintain, nothing to bypass client-side.
items.followUp: Owner configures Access in the Cloudflare dashboard (see docs/PRIVATE_TESTING_GATE.md).
